title: Match the parts
drDigitalIntro:
Let's see how much you remember!
• Match each part of the laptop to its name.

playgroundTask.instructions: Click a dot on the laptop, then click the name it belongs to.

drDigitalSuccess: Wonderful — you know your laptop inside and out!
drDigitalHint: Click a dot on the laptop first, then click the name you think it is. Green means you got it!
